creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: flo
Date: Sun Jun 30 16:11:08 2013
New Revision: 322092
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322092

Log:
  Update to 2.2.3
  
  PR:		ports/180089
  Submitted by:	Gea-Suan Lin <gslin@gslin.org>

Modified:
  head/databases/percona-toolkit/Makefile
  head/databases/percona-toolkit/distinfo
  head/databases/percona-toolkit/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/percona-toolkit/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/databases/percona-toolkit/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/percona-toolkit/Makefile	Sun Jun 30 16:01:18 2013	(r322091)
+++ head/databases/percona-toolkit/Makefile	Sun Jun 30 16:11:08 2013	(r322092)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	percona-toolkit
-PORTVERSION=	2.2.2
+PORTVERSION=	2.2.3
 CATEGORIES=	databases
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.percona.com/downloads/percona-toolkit/${PORTVERSION}/
 
@@ -16,6 +16,7 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	bash:${PORTSDIR}/shells/bas
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
 MAN1=	percona-toolkit.1 \
+	pt-agent.1 \
 	pt-align.1 \
 	pt-archiver.1 \
 	pt-config-diff.1 \

     Analyze queries from logs and tcpdump
     Collect vital system information when problems occur
 
-WWW:	http://www.percona.com/software/percona-toolkit/
